song.title: Keep Up the Song of Faith
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Keep up the song of faith, However dark the night; And as you praise the Lord will work To change your faith to sight, To change your faith to sight.
[V2] 2) Keep up the song of faith, And let your heart be strong, For God delights when faith can praise Though dark the night and long, Though dark the night and long.
[V3] 3) Keep up the song of faith, The foe will hear and flee; Oh, let not Satan hush your song. For praise is victory, For praise is victory.
[V4] 4) Keep up the song of faith, The dawn will break ere long, And we shall go to meet the Lord, And join the endless song, And join the endless song.
song.author: Margaret E. Barber
